# PHASE 8 — UI Product Shell

## Entry Point
`erp-business-command-center.php` — مرکز فرماندهی تجاری MOGHARE360

## Features
- Module cards for Phases 1–7 with COMPLETED FOUNDATION badge
- Main link + sub-links per module
- Phase 8/9/10 status summary
- Read-only, RTL, Soft Run aligned CSS

## Helper
`erp-business-layer-helper.php` — static module registry, rendering, optional DB stats
